originalTitle: GitHub confirms breach of 3,800 repos via malicious VSCode extension
content:
GitHub has confirmed that roughly 3,800 internal repositories were breached after one of its employees installed a malicious VS Code extension.

The company has since removed the unnamed trojanized extension from the VS Code marketplace and has secured the compromised device.

"Yesterday we detected and contained a compromise of an employee device involving a poisoned VS Code extension. We removed the malicious extension version, isolated the endpoint, and began incident response immediately," the company said .

"Our current assessment is that the activity involved exfiltration of GitHub-internal repositories only. The attacker's current claims of ~3,800 repositories are directionally consistent with our investigation so far."

This comes after GitHub told BleepingComputer on Tuesday evening that it was investigating claims of unauthorized access to its internal repositories and added that it has no evidence that customer data stored outside the affected repos has been affected.

While GitHub has yet to attribute the breach, the TeamPCP hacker group claimed access to GitHub source code and "~4,000 repos of private code" on the Breached cybercrime forum on Tuesday, asking for at least $50,000 for the stolen data.

"As always this is not a ransom, We do not care about extorting Github, 1 buyer and we shred the data on our end, it looks like our retirement is soon so if no buyer is found we will leak it free," the cybercriminals said. "If you are interested. Send your offers to the communications below, we are not interested in under 50k, the best offer will get it."

​TeamPCP was previously linked to massive supply chain attacks targeting developer code platforms, including GitHub , PyPI , NPM , and Docker , and, more recently, to the "Mini Shai-Hulud" supply chain campaign (which also impacted two OpenAI employees).

​VS Code extensions are plugins that can be installed from the VS Code Marketplace (the official store for add-ons for Microsoft's code editor) to add features or integrate tools into the editor.

This isn't the first time a trojanized VS Code extension has been spotted on the marketplace, as multiple other malicious extensions with millions of installs have been used to steal developer credentials and other sensitive data over the last several years.

For instance, last year, VSCode extensions with 9 million installs were pulled over security risks , and 10 more, posing as legitimate development tools, infected users with the XMRig cryptominer .

Later in the year, a malicious extension with basic ransomware capabilities snuck onto the VS Code marketplace after a threat actor named WhiteCobra flooded it with 24 crypto-stealing extensions .

More recently, in January, two malicious extensions advertised as AI-based coding assistants with 1.5 million installs exfiltrated data from compromised developer systems to servers in China .

GitHub's cloud-based platform is now used by over 4 million organizations (including 90% of the Fortune 100) and more than 180 million developers who contribute to over 420 million code repositories.

The Validation Gap: Automated Pentesting Answers One Question. You Need Six.

Automated pentesting tools deliver real value, but they were built to answer one question: can an attacker move through the network? They were not built to test whether your controls block threats, your detection rules fire, or your cloud configs hold.

This guide covers the 6 surfaces you actually need to validate.

GitHub links repo breach to TanStack npm supply-chain attack

GitHub investigates internal repositories breach claimed by TeamPCP

Grafana breach caused by missed token rotation after TanStack attack

7-Eleven confirms data breach claimed by the ShinyHunters gang

Grafana says stolen GitHub token let hackers steal codebase
chineseTitle: GitHub 确认通过恶意 VSCode 扩展破坏了 3,800 个存储库
chineseContent:
GitHub 已确认，在一名员工安装恶意 VS Code 扩展后，大约 3,800 个内部存储库遭到破坏。

此后，该公司已从 VS Code 市场中删除了未命名的木马扩展，并保护了受感染设备的安全。

该公司表示：“昨天，我们检测到并遏制了涉及中毒 VS Code 扩展的员工设备的泄露。我们删除了恶意扩展版本，隔离了端点，并立即开始事件响应。”

“我们目前的评估是，该活动仅涉及 GitHub 内部存储库的泄露。攻击者当前声称的约 3,800 个存储库与我们迄今为止的调查方向一致。”

在此之前，GitHub 在周二晚间告诉 BleepingComputer，它正在调查未经授权访问其内部存储库的指控，并补充说，没有证据表明存储在受影响存储库之外的客户数据受到了影响。

虽然 GitHub 尚未对此次泄露事件进行归因，但 TeamPCP 黑客组织周二在 Breached 网络犯罪论坛上声称可以访问 GitHub 源代码和“约 4,000 个私人代码库”，并要求为被盗数据至少支付 50,000 美元。

网络犯罪分子表示：“一如既往，这不是赎金，我们不在乎敲诈 Github、1 个买家，我们会粉碎我们这边的数据，看起来我们很快就要退休了，所以如果没有找到买家，我们将免费泄露数据。” “如果您有兴趣，请将您的报价发送到下面的通讯中，我们对 50k 以下不感兴趣，最好的报价将得到它。”

TeamPCP 此前曾与针对开发人员代码平台（包括 GitHub、PyPI、NPM 和 Docker）的大规模供应链攻击有关，最近又与“Mini Shai-Hulud”供应链活动（该活动也影响了两名 OpenAI 员工）有关。

VS Code 扩展是可以从 VS Code Marketplace（Microsoft 代码编辑器附加组件的官方商店）安装的插件，用于添加功能或将工具集成到编辑器中。

这并不是第一次在市场上发现木马 VS Code 扩展，因为在过去几年中，安装了数百万次的其他多个恶意扩展已被用来窃取开发人员凭据和其他敏感数据。

例如，去年，安装量达 900 万次的 VSCode 扩展因安全风险而被撤下，还有 10 个冒充合法开发工具，通过 XMRig 加密货币挖矿程序感染用户。

今年晚些时候，一个名为 WhiteCobra 的威胁参与者向 VS Code 市场注入了 24 个加密窃取扩展程序，之后，一个具有基本勒索软件功能的恶意扩展程序悄悄进入了 VS Code 市场。

最近，一月份，两个恶意扩展程序宣传为基于人工智能的编码助手，安装量达到 150 万次，将数据从受感染的开发人员系统窃取到中国的服务器上。

GitHub 的云平台现已被超过 400 万个组织（包括财富 100 强中的 90%）和超过 1.8 亿开发人员使用，他们为超过 4.2 亿个代码存储库做出了贡献。

验证差距：自动化渗透测试回答一个问题。你需要六个。

自动化渗透测试工具提供了真正的价值，但它们的构建是为了回答一个问题：攻击者可以通过网络移动吗？它们并不是为了测试您的控件是否阻止威胁、您的检测规则是否有效或您的云配置是否有效而构建的。

本指南涵盖了您实际需要验证的 6 个表面。

GitHub 将存储库泄露与 TanStack npm 供应链攻击联系起来

GitHub 正在调查 TeamPCP 声称的内部存储库泄露事件

TanStack 攻击后由于错过代币轮换而导致 Grafana 泄露

7-11 证实 ShinyHunters 团伙声称数据泄露

Grafana 称被盗的 GitHub 代币让黑客窃取了代码库
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
